description_long: This is a Kalashnikov-style assault rifle featuring a distinctive wooden pistol grip and magazine, paired with a black metal receiver and barrel assembly. The rifle is equipped with a skeletonized folding stock, which is constructed from metal and designed for compactness and portability. The magazine is curved and detachable, made from wood or wood-laminate, and the handguard also displays a wooden finish. The barrel is standard length and ends with a slotted flash hider. Iron sights are mounted on the top, with the front sight post and rear notch both visible. The overall appearance is rugged, with a mix of matte and slightly worn textures, suitable for urban environments.
description: A Kalashnikov-style assault rifle with a wooden grip and magazine, black metal receiver, and a skeletonized folding stock. Features iron sights and a slotted flash hider.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, wooden grip and magazine, skeletonized folding stock, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Barrel-end view highlighting the muzzle, flash hider, and narrow profile of the receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden components, metal receiver, and folding stock from the left.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock, rear sight, and the alignment of the barrel.
